title: Cat 3 partial — eb-agent coverage + drift + dangling tools (7 SR-independent)
description: First eb-agent expansion deliverable to land as a schema-bound instance in luh-tech/schema-registry per cross-repo execution shape established via canvases F0B83PF9LD7 (EB request) + F0B7VHT6KAP (SR ACK). EB-chat authored spec body; SR-chat lands the deliverable instance; EB terminal executes 7 SR-independent eb-agent tools against the anchored spec; SR transitions the instance through S5/S6/S7/S8 on EB PR merge. Cat 1 (PR #285) and Cat 2 (PR #287) shipped without schema-registry instances; this deliverable initiates the corrected pattern. Two further Cat 3 tools (drift-liveness, drift-vpcpeering) deferred to Cat 3b after SR Items A + B from canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 merge. Tool surface grows 22 -> 29 on OUT-1 merge; Cat 3b will grow 29 -> 31.

authority.author: Claude (EB-chat), L1; reshaped to canonical schema by Claude (SR-chat), L1

outputs.description: Seven new eb-agent tools + unit tests + CLI/MCP registration + AGENTS.md update on luh-tech/Ectropy-Business. Single PR off feat/eb-agent-cat3-coverage-drift-2026-06-03 branch. Tool-by-tool: (1) coverage-infrastructure — set-diff infrastructure-catalog.json buckets/servers/environments vs resource-access.json grants and host postures; two-sided gap surface. Est 150 LoC. (2) coverage-credentials — set-diff envRoute role tokens in resource-access.json vs credentialStore items by role; surfaces dangling tokens and orphaned items. Est 120 LoC. (3) coverage-workflows — cross-source workflow-registry.json vs filesystem .github/workflows/*.yml; surfaces registered-but-missing and present-but-unregistered workflows. First Cat 3 tool with filesystem dependency. Est 140 LoC. (4) drift-rotation — time math on credentialItem.rotation.lastRotated vs rotation.intervalDays; surfaces credentials past rotation policy. Est 80 LoC. (5) dangling-credentialRefs — FK existence check accessGrants[].credentialRef vs credentialStore[].itemId. Est 70 LoC. (6) dangling-resourceRefs — FK existence check accessGrants[].resourceRef vs infrastructure-catalog.json. Est 80 LoC. (7) coverage-deliverable-fks — cross-source architecture.json services[].deliverableId vs feature/deliverable index in roadmap.json. Est 150 LoC. Total impl ~790 LoC, total tests ~250 LoC.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 tools loadable via eb-agent CLI: eb-agent <tool-name> --help returns 0 with usage text
All 7 tools registered in MCP server surface; tool_search returns each by name
Each tool has at minimum one passing unit test exercising the happy path
Each tool has at minimum one passing unit test exercising the gap-detected path (returns non-empty gap list)
eb-agent surface count grows 22 -> 29 (verified by tool_search registry inspection)
AGENTS.md updated to document Cat 3 tools with one-line description each
pytest passes for all new tests with zero failures, zero errors
PR CI green on Roadmap CI workflow (pre-existing baseline drift acknowledged separately per RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1)

transitions.trigger: Spec body authored by EB-chat 2026-06-03 morning; handed via direct file attachment with SHA256 2867b62a35246b420b156e12e82dd2c13a7739246f87f256d63945a931ee2cc5. SR-chat reshape applied to align with canonical deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0: deliverableId -> id, added required version + description, scope.scopeNote folded into description, per-output acceptance.criteria flattened to acceptanceCriteria, per-output validation folded into top-level validation, per-output toolsAdded + estLoC + repo + expectedPR folded into description text, context + downstream + retention folded into description and notes, branch suffixed with date to match canonical pattern regex. Zero information loss verified field-by-field. Sandbox ajv validation PASS post-reshape.

Amendment per EB-chat canvas F0B8612NEF6 2026-06-03. EB terminal Step 2 substrate-read against EB main 7dd3875 verified that originally-anchored scopeFiles paths (agent/eb_agent/tools/, agent/eb_agent/tests/, agent/eb_agent/cli.py, agent/eb_agent/mcp_server.py, agent/AGENTS.md) do not exist on EB filesystem. Path-only deviation; surface count (22 -> 29), tool descriptions, acceptance criteria, branch name, and intent unchanged. Path corrections: agent/eb_agent/tools/*.py -> agent/src/agent/tools/*.py; agent/eb_agent/tests/test_*.py -> agent/tests/test_*.py; cli.py + mcp_server.py collapse to single agent/agent.yaml (EB pattern: __main__.py:build_registry() iterates yaml tools list, MCP server imports same registry); AGENTS.md moves from agent/AGENTS.md to repo root AGENTS.md. Net file count 18 -> 17. SPIKE not invoked — path correction is in-scope substrate verification per RULE-PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK-1, not novel substrate. Per Erik approval 2026-06-03.

notes: First eb-agent expansion deliverable landing as schema-bound instance in luh-tech/schema-registry. Cat 1 (PR #285) and Cat 2 (PR #287) shipped without schema-registry instances; this deliverable initiates the corrected pattern. Cat 3b successor lands two further tools (drift-liveness, drift-vpcpeering, surface 29 -> 31) after SR Items A + B from canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 merge; successor follows same cross-repo execution shape — new tracking FU + new deliverable instance + EB execution PR + atomic closure. Coordination canvases: F0B83PF9LD7 (EB request), F0B7VHT6KAP (SR ACK). Source EB spec body SHA256: 2867b62a35246b420b156e12e82dd2c13a7739246f87f256d63945a931ee2cc5; reshape provenance recorded in transitions[0].trigger. Retention: permanent schema-bound governance record per memory rule no-md-terminus. Branch disposition: delete on merge per canonical branching flow. Spike branches (if any open mid-flight) never merged; deleted at terminal per RULE-PIPELINE-SPIKE-SUPERSEDES-NOVEL-PATTERN-1. AMENDMENT 2026-06-03 per canvas F0B8612NEF6: scopeFiles corrected after EB Step 2 substrate-read against EB main 7dd3875. Original spec authored without verifying repo structure (paths inferred from convention). Net file count 18 -> 17 due to cli.py + mcp_server.py collapse to single agent.yaml declarative surface. Path-only correction; surface count and intent unchanged. See transitions[1] for full provenance.
